QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: videoSource
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Source for video stream.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Source for video. UDP, TCP, RTSP, HTTP MJPEG, WebSocket JPEG, and UVC cameras may be supported depending on vehicle and ground station build.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Source

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: udpUrl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Network address and port for UDP video stream (e.g. 0.0.0.0:5600).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: UDP url address and port to bind to for video stream. Example: 0.0.0.0:5600
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: UDP URL

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: rtspUrl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Network address for RTSP video stream (e.g. rtsp://192.168.42.1:554/live).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: RTSP url address and port to bind to for video stream. Example: rtsp://192.168.42.1:554/live
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: RTSP URL

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: tcpUrl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Network address and port for TCP video stream (e.g. 192.168.143.200:3001).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: TCP url address and port to bind to for video stream. Example: 192.168.143.200:3001
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: TCP URL

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: httpMjpegUrl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: HTTP or HTTPS URL for a multipart MJPEG stream.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: URL for a standard multipart/x-mixed-replace MJPEG source. Anonymous HTTP is intended for local or trusted test networks. Credentials require HTTPS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: HTTP MJPEG URL

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: websocketJpegUrl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: WebSocket URL that sends each JPEG image as one binary message.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: URL for a WebSocket JPEG source. Text messages are ignored. Anonymous WS is intended for local or trusted test networks. Credentials require WSS.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: WebSocket JPEG URL

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: networkVideoAuthType
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Authentication method for HTTP MJPEG and WebSocket JPEG sources.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Authentication is optional. Basic and Bearer credentials are accepted only with HTTPS or WSS and are never stored directly in QGroundControl settings.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Authentication

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: networkVideoUsername
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Username used with Basic authentication.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Username

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: networkVideoSecretFile
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Optional file containing one password or token.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: On Unix-like desktop systems, load the credential from a regular owner-only file containing a single line. A session credential entered in the UI takes precedence. Other platforms use a session credential.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Credential file

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: networkVideoOrigin
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Optional Origin value required by some HTTP or WebSocket servers.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Sets the Origin request header. Leave blank unless the source server requires an exact Origin.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Origin

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: networkVideoCaCertificateFile
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Optional PEM trust file for HTTPS or WSS certificate validation.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: WSS adds these authorities to the system trust store. For HTTP MJPEG, the PEM file is the complete trust database and must include every required root. Strict certificate validation remains enabled.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: CA certificate file

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: videoSavePath
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Video save directory
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Directory to save videos to.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Video save directory

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: aspectRatio
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Video frame aspect ratio as width divided by height. Use 0 to auto-detect.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Video Aspect Ratio (width / height). Use 0.0 to ignore it.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Aspect Ratio

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: gridLines
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Video Grid Lines
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Displays a grid overlaid over the video view.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Video Grid Lines

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: videoFit
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Video Display Fit
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Handle Video Aspect Ratio.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Video Display Fit

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: showRecControl
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Show Video Record Control
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Show recording control in the UI.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Show Video Record Control

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: recordingFormat
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: File format for saved video recordings.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Video recording file format.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Record File Format

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: maxVideoSize
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Maximum disk space available for video recording storage.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Maximum amount of disk space used by video recording.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Max Storage Usage

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: enableStorageLimit
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Automatically delete oldest recordings when the storage limit is exceeded.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, old video files will be auto-deleted when the total size of QGC-recorded video exceeds the maximum video storage usage.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Auto-Delete Saved Recordings

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: rtspTimeout
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: RTSP Video Timeout
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: How long to wait before assuming RTSP link is gone.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: RTSP Video Timeout

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: streamEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Video Stream Enabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Start/Stop Video Stream.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Video Stream Enabled

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: disableWhenDisarmed
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Disables the video stream when the vehicle is disarmed to save bandwidth.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Disable Video Stream when disarmed.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Stop recording when disarmed

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: lowLatencyMode
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Reduce video latency by approximately 200ms using optimized streaming settings.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: If this option is enabled, the rtpjitterbuffer is removed and the video sink is set to assynchronous mode, reducing the latency by about 200 ms.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Low Latency Mode

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: rtpJitterLatencyMs
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: RTP jitter-buffer playout latency (ms).
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Latency budget for the RTP jitter buffer (rtspsrc.latency / rtpjitterbuffer.latency). Lower = less glass-to-glass delay; higher = more headroom for packet reordering and retransmission. The default of 80 ms allows RFC 4588 retransmission to recover lost packets before the playout deadline; values <40 ms effectively disable retransmission. Ignored when Low Latency Mode is enabled.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: RTP jitter latency

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: rtspAutoReconnect
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Automatically restart the pipeline on watchdog timeout or pipeline error.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: When enabled, the receiver reconnects with exponential backoff (1s → 30s) after a stream timeout or a fatal pipeline error. Disable to fall back to the legacy behaviour of giving up after one failure.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Auto-reconnect on stream loss

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: forceVideoDecoder
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Override automatic video decoder selection to force a specific decoding method.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Force the change of prioritization between video decode methods, allowing the user to force some video hardware decode plugins if necessary.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.enumStrings: Default,Force software decoder,Force hardware decoder,Force NVIDIA decoder,Force VA-API decoder,Force DirectX3D 11 decoder,Force VideoToolbox decoder,Force Intel decoder,Force Vulkan decoder
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Force video decoder priority

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: forceCpuVideoPath
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Force the video pipeline to copy frames through CPU instead of importing GPU memory directly.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: By default, when a hardware decoder produces GPU-backed frames (DMABuf, GLMemory, D3D11, IOSurface, AHardwareBuffer), the pipeline imports them directly into Qt's render thread to avoid a per-frame CPU copy. The pipeline already falls back to the CPU path automatically when a GPU import fails, so this option is only needed for debugging or to work around a broken driver.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Force CPU video path

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: videoConversionElement
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Override the GStreamer color-conversion element used in the CPU video sink path.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Leave blank to auto-probe (SoC-native imxvideoconvert_g2d / nvvidconv when present, otherwise videoconvert). Set to a specific GStreamer factory name to force that element. Used as a workaround when an SoC's preferred element has a defect; takes effect on next stream restart.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Video conversion element override

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: disablePixelAspectRatio
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Skip the PAR=1/1 capsfilter in the CPU video sink path.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: QGC normally inserts a pixel-aspect-ratio=1/1 capsfilter so non-square-pixel sources (some RTSP cams, DVB) don't render geometrically distorted. A few v4l2 drivers without VIDIOC_CROPCAP deadlock negotiation when PAR is forced; enable this option as a workaround. Takes effect on next stream restart.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Disable pixel-aspect-ratio normalization
